name: Property Compliance Readiness
description: Leasing and Maintenance produce a blocker/warning readiness score for a property before a compliance-sensitive action.

stages.name: Collect Compliance Inputs
stages.description: Gather property, lease, inspection, and open-maintenance facts.

steps.title: Collect property compliance facts
steps.instructions: Collect lease, owner, occupancy, inspection, and license facts available for this property.
steps.dispatch_body: Collect property compliance inputs and identify missing sources.

steps.title: Collect maintenance blockers
steps.instructions: Collect open emergency, safety, habitability, inspection, and vendor-document blockers for this property.
steps.dispatch_body: Collect maintenance-side compliance blockers and warnings for the property.

stages.name: Score Readiness
stages.description: Generate a named blockers/warnings report and readiness score.

steps.title: Build readiness score
steps.instructions: Build a 0-100 readiness score with explicit blockers and warnings. Do not hide unknown data.
steps.dispatch_body: Build blocker/warning readiness score from collected property inputs.

steps.title: Review readiness score
steps.instructions: Review the readiness score, confirming blockers are real and unknowns are labeled honestly.
steps.human_prompt: Review property readiness score before it is shown as a decision artifact.

stages.name: Publish Decision Artifact
stages.description: Make the readiness artifact available to the relevant operator or owner-facing view.

steps.title: Stage readiness artifact
steps.instructions: Stage the approved readiness artifact for Pulse or the owner status projection.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved property readiness artifact for cockpit consumption.

steps.title: Track blocker resolution
steps.instructions: Track open blockers until cleared or explicitly accepted.
steps.dispatch_body: Track readiness blockers and update the workflow when cleared.
